directive_requirement: €200 lower limit abolished; ceiling raised to €100,000; BNPL, credit cards and authorised overdrafts brought into scope
nl_implementation: 'Verlenen van uitstel van betaling' added to credit (Wft 1:1); art 1:20 exceptions removed; AFM licence (Wft 2:60) needed; narrow ≤50-day BNPL exception in new Wft 1:20

directive_requirement: Assessment 'necessary and proportionate'; ban on social-network data and special-category data
nl_implementation: Wft 4:34 recast; new Wft 4:34a bans social-network/special-category data; 4:34a(2) basis to redact 'bijvangst' special-category data

provision: Ban on credit to minors (CCD2 art 6 / art 18)
directive_requirement: Member-State option for objective-justified age differentiation
nl_implementation: New Wft 4:34b public-law ban on deferred-payment credit to minors + mandatory age verification; BW 7:75(4) makes such agreements voidable
status: In bill 36924 (legal basis changed to CCD2 art 6 after RvS advice)

directive_requirement: Ban on misleading credit advertising; standard information requirements
nl_implementation: Ban on advertising suggesting credit improves the consumer's finances or that a BKR registration has little effect; four new BGfo advertising prohibitions (via AMvB)

provision: Pre-contractual information, withdrawal, early repayment (CCD2 arts 10-21)
directive_requirement: SECCI-style information modernised; 14-day withdrawal maintained; early-repayment cost reduction strengthened
nl_implementation: Implemented across Wft / BW Boek 7; tying prohibited in principle (BW 7:77) except insurance / payment-or-savings account

directive_requirement: Inform consumer of registered arrears; reasonable forbearance before enforcement
nl_implementation: New Wft 4:35b (early detection + referral to debt advice) and BW 7:68a (referral duty); existing arrears-respite in BW 70a/128aa + Wft 4:35a

directive_requirement: Member States may exempt deferred-debit cards
nl_implementation: NL does not exempt but applies the rules 6 months later than the rest of the act (new Wft 1:20(4))
